discrepancies.description: PROMPT 186 spec enumerated '5 deliverables' but standard SIARC handoff structure requires 6 files (runbook + handoff + claims + halt + discrepancy + unexpected_finds). This session writes 6 files; the spec's count of 5 was a labeling convenience that lumped discrepancy + unexpected_finds together.
discrepancies.resolution: Accept-as-is; 6 files written; no spec violation

discrepancies.description: Amendment 4 (Mathlib/toolchain pin) lists no concrete pinned-SHA in the runbook because no M10 discharge fire is active; the pin happens at next 148R-class fire time, not at runbook-compose time.
discrepancies.resolution: Accept-as-is; gate-triggered amendment, not state-asserting amendment

discrepancies.description: Runbook references slot 174 amendment fire as the source-of-truth for Zenodo concept-DOIs (zenodo.19936297 vs zenodo.19937196 distinction); this is a forward-reference to a prior bridge SHA that this fire does not re-verify in line.
discrepancies.resolution: Cross-reference rather than re-verification; downstream Zenodo-deposit-time pre-paste re-verification expected per substrate-verification memory
